evals.description: Translates Figma horizontal auto layout to CSS flexbox
evals.prompt: I have a Figma frame with auto layout: Horizontal direction, 16px gap, 12px 24px padding, align items center. What CSS should I write?

evals.description: Maps Figma Fill Container width to CSS flex or 100% width
evals.prompt: In Figma, a child element inside auto layout has its width set to 'Fill container'. What CSS should I apply?

evals.description: Maps Figma Hug contents to CSS fit-content
evals.prompt: A Figma element has 'Hug contents' for its width. What does that mean in CSS?

evals.description: Converts Figma component variants to React component props
evals.prompt: I have a Figma Button component with variant properties: Size (sm, md, lg), Type (primary, secondary, ghost), State (default, disabled). How do I implement this in React?

evals.description: Correctly converts Figma line-height from px to unitless
evals.prompt: Figma shows font-size: 16px and line-height: 24px. How do I write this in CSS?

evals.description: Handles Figma Left+Right constraints as stretching element
evals.prompt: A Figma element has constraints: Left and Right (both set). What responsive CSS does this imply?

evals.description: Extracts and implements design tokens as CSS custom properties
evals.prompt: I need to implement Figma's color variables as CSS. The collection has primitive colors (blue-500: #3b82f6) and semantic aliases (action-primary -> blue-500). How do I structure this?

evals.description: Advises inspecting Figma panel over eyeballing values
evals.prompt: Should I eyeball spacing values from the Figma design screenshot or use the inspect panel?

evals.description: Maps Figma vertical auto layout to CSS flex-direction column
evals.prompt: Figma auto layout is set to Vertical direction with 8px gap and 24px padding. What CSS do I write?
The Figma design shows 13px padding between elements. Should I just hard-code that value?

evals.description: Correctly converts Figma letter-spacing percent to em
evals.prompt: Figma shows letter-spacing: 2% on a text label. How do I write this in CSS?

evals.description: References figma-css-mapping.md for detailed property reference
evals.prompt: I need a full reference of how Figma blend modes, effects, and shadows map to CSS. Where should I look?
